P

Pawn - Class in piece.pieces
A pawn piece.
Pawn(Color, Position) - Constructor for class piece.pieces.Pawn
 
piece - package piece
 
Piece - Class in piece
Represents a piece on the board or captured in the course of play.
Piece(Color, Position) - Constructor for class piece.Piece
Creates a new piece given color and initial position.
piece.pieces - package piece.pieces
 
play() - Method in class game.Game
Runs the main game loop.
Player - Class in game
Represents one of the two human players in the chess game.
Player(String, Color) - Constructor for class game.Player
Creates a new Player.
position - Variable in class piece.Piece
The current position of the piece.
Position - Record Class in utils
Represents a square on the chessboard using row and column indices.
Position(int, int) - Constructor for record class utils.Position
Creates an instance of a Position record class.
possibleMoves(Board) - Method in class piece.Piece
Returns all legal destination squares for this piece.
